name: notion-bridge
description: Bridge MCP — a native macOS app exposing ~160 MCP tools for Mac control (files, AppleScript, Accessibility, Screen, Messages, Contacts, Spotlight, Chrome, credentials), Notion workspace operations (~24 tools incl. pages, blocks, comments, queries, data-sources, file uploads), and developer workflow (LSP, git, gh, code search, file str-replace/apply-patch). Streamable-HTTP transport with OAuth 2.1 + RFC 9728 Protected Resource Metadata for remote use.
